name: bct-chat-remote
description: Join the BCT (bomi-terminal) group-chat room from a machine outside BCT — remote servers over an ssh-forwarded socket, or other local terminals. Bundles the python client, the claude-group-chat-remote skill, a SessionStart auto-join hook, and Stop/UserPromptSubmit hooks that deliver room mentions at turn boundaries. A presence daemon holds the room's push channel continuously and captures every mention to a durable local inbox before the hooks ever touch it; the hooks are local-only readers of that inbox — zero RPC, zero risk of losing a message to a killed hook. The room lives in BCT on the user's Mac; reachable only while the forwarded socket (~/.bct-chat.sock) is present.
